executives.name: Peter Wasow
executives.background: Peter Wasow has over 30 years' experience in the resources and energy sectors. He was previously the Managing Director and CEO of Alumina Limited and held senior executive roles at Santos Limited and BHP. He has extensive experience in financial management, strategy, and corporate governance.

tenure_dates.title: Executive Vice President and Chief Financial Officer

executives.name: Vanessa Guthrie
executives.background: Dr. Vanessa Guthrie was appointed as a Non-Executive Director on 1 October 2020. She has over 30 years of experience in the mining and energy sectors and is a former CEO of Toro Energy Limited.

board_of_directors.name: Vanessa Guthrie
board_of_directors.background: Dr. Vanessa Guthrie was appointed as a Non-Executive Director on 1 October 2020. She has over 30 years of experience in the mining and energy sectors and is a former CEO of Toro Energy Limited.
